title: Period. End of Sentence.
posterAlt: Period. End of Sentence. (2018) movie poster
tmdbOverview: In an effort to improve feminine hygiene, a machine that creates low-cost biodegradable sanitary pads is installed in a rural village in Northern India. Using the machine, a group of local women is employed to produce and sell pads, offering them newfound independence and helping to destigmatize menstruation for all.
synopsis: Period. End of Sentence. is a 2018 documentary film from India. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 전체관람가 certification (KR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
